examples.name: Bug Fix — Null pointer with failing test and stack trace

bundle.task_brief: Fix null pointer in context packer when file list is empty.

selected_files.title: context_packer.py
selected_files.reason: Contains the null pointer bug in the scan_files method.

selected_failures.title: test_empty_file_list failure
selected_failures.reason: This test exposes the null pointer by passing an empty list.
selected_failures.content:
FAILED test_empty_file_list - TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

    def test_empty_file_list():
        packer = ContextPacker()
>       result = packer.scan_files([])
E       TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable

selected_docs.title: Context Packer API — scan_files
selected_docs.reason: Documents the expected return type of scan_files.
selected_docs.content:
scan_files(paths: list[str]) -> list[FileEntry]
Returns a list of FileEntry objects for each valid path. Returns an empty list if paths is empty.

bundle.task_brief: Add a file watcher that triggers context repack when files are modified.

selected_files.title: context_packer.py
selected_files.reason: Existing packer that needs watcher integration — the pack() method must be called on file change.

selected_files.title: watcher.py (new file)
selected_files.reason: New file to create with the file watcher implementation.
selected_files.content: # TODO: implement FileWatcher that calls ContextPacker.pack() on file system events

selected_docs.title: watchdog — Observer pattern
selected_docs.reason: Reference for the filesystem event observer API used to implement file watching.
selected_docs.content:
from watchdog.observers import Observer
from watchdog.events import FileSystemEventHandler

class MyHandler(FileSystemEventHandler):
    def on_modified(self, event):
        print(f'File modified: {event.src_path}')

observer = Observer()
observer.schedule(MyHandler(), path='.', recursive=True)
observer.start()

success_signals: context repack triggers on file modification
